policy: Expanded snippets do not promote candidates. They only strengthen display and audit of rows already in authoritative_scope_rows.

records.acceptance_tier_en: A1 structured company-level absolute value; directly usable
records.acceptance_tier_zh: A1 公司级结构化绝对量，可直接使用
records.recognition_basis_en: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.recognition_basis_zh: Expanded from source page text for direct-use Scope evidence.
records.snippet_en: unit Turnover (MMTCO2e/ I Crore) 29.57 22.29 26.27 20.83 0.71 20.21 0.63 22.00 0.76 Emission Contribution by Business Units Petrochemicals Marketing & Others Pipelines Refineries 1.3% 16.5% 1.5% 80.7% Transparent and Accurate Accounting of GHG Emissions We recognise the challenges posed by climate change and have crafted a comprehensive climate strategy focused on the transparent and precise tracking of GHG emissions. This approach encompasses the measurement and reporting of GHG emissions, consistent monitoring and public disclosure of the Company's GHG footprint, along with third-party verification of these disclosures. Scope 3 Emissions At IndianOil, we prioritise the estimation of emissions from the use of sold products, business travel, upstream transportation and distribution and waste generated at operations. The total greenhouse gas emissions from these four Scope-3 sources are estimated annually with over 90% of these emissions stemming primarily from the use of sold products. Thus, our primary effort is focused on expanding our green product portfolio. 351.09 MMTCO2e Total Scope 3 emissions 22.76 MMTCO2e Total Scope 1+2 Emissions Fuel and Energy Related Activities Upstream Transportation and Distribution
